missing_coverage: Phone number format validation (e.g., must be 10 digits)
Email format validation (e.g., must contain @ and domain)
Password complexity: at least one uppercase and one lowercase letter
Maximum field length validation for first name, last name, username
Terms and conditions acceptance requirement (if any)
Account lockout or rate limiting after multiple failed login attempts
recommendations: Add test cases for username uniqueness (duplicate username registration)
Add test cases for invalid email formats (e.g., missing @, invalid domain)
Add test cases for invalid phone formats (e.g., non-numeric, too short, too long)
Add test cases for password missing uppercase and missing lowercase letters separately
Add boundary tests for maximum field lengths for first name, last name, username
Clarify expected error messages in TC011 and TC013 to be more specific
Ensure all test data includes valid values for non-focus fields to avoid unintended validation failures
